name: handily networks
notes:
**AS47526** (handily networks GmbH) is a Internet carrier specializing in carrier-for-content connectivity and scalable network infrastructure. 

We deliver reliable, high-performance IP transit and transport services for content providers, CDNs, platforms, and network operators.

Our network supports efficient content delivery via Ethernet and optical transport, complemented by DDoS protection and traffic analysis.

Colocation and infrastructure services are available for distributed and latency-sensitive deployments.

We also operate frankonIX, a regional Internet Exchange in the city of Nuremberg, Germany, focused on neutral, low-latency traffic exchange. 

We are open to settlement-free peering at suitable Internet Exchanges or Private Network Interconnects (PNIs).
